content.privacyText: We respect your privacy. Any information collected is used only to provide and improve your experience. Your data is handled securely and is never sold to third parties.
content.termsText: By using this website, you agree to comply with our Terms of Use. Availability of offers may vary based on eligibility, location, and advertiser requirements. We reserve the right to modify or discontinue the service at any time without prior notice.

security.csp: default-src 'self' https:; img-src 'self' data: https:; script-src 'self' https: 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' https: 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https:; frame-ancestors 'none'
